channel.title: News on Curious Electric Website
channel.description: Recent content in News on Curious Electric Website

item.title: Soft launch of mixxape!
item.description: mixxape soft launches! Register with the newsletter to be part of the beta program.

item.title: Successful completion of STARLIGHT
item.description: We have successfully completed the STARLIGHT project, which was supported by Film- und Medienstiftung NRW.

item.title: New courses for Godot Game Engine
item.description: We are now offering Godot Game Engine courses for small teams, both in person and remote. For more information and inquiries please send an email to info@curious-electric.com.

item.title: STARLIGHT receives funding
Next courses announced at CGL Winter 2023
item.description: From September to December 2023 more Godot and Javascript for MA1 and MA3 courses on the Cologne Game Lab.

item.title: Next Godot course at Cologne Game Lab
item.description: In May and June 2023 more Godot 3.5.2 and 4 in a course for the Cologne Game Lab. Schedules for Master classes: MA1: 12.05.2022, 23.05.2023, tba

item.title: Lychor released on Apple App Store
item.description: LyChor, an App to display lyrics and Chords was released on the App Store! More information on the product page.

item.title: Filmstro V2
item.description: The Filmstro WebApp V2 is about to get ready! project page.

item.title: Game trailer first draft
item.description: Trailer for possible upcoming game written in Godot to support the Band Radio Anywhere. https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=7r-r8lRbL3E

item.title: Godot tutorial published
item.description: Tutorial on how to import Assets into the Godot game engine. https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=7r-r8lRbL3E

item.title: Preparation for CGL course
item.description: In November and December 2022 we will conduct a Godot course for the Cologne Game Lab. Schedules for Master classes: MA3: 27.10.2022, 03.11.2022, 10.11.2022, 17.11.2022 MA1: 07.12.2022, 14.12.2022, 11.01.2023, 18.01.2023

item.title: Filmstro WebApp
item.description: The new Filmstro WebApp is online! For more ino visit the project page.

item.title: 'Alvirah and Willy' launch
item.description: Together with the famous artist Nieves de la Fuente we launched ‘Alvirah and Willy’ - more infos on the project page.
